---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work?

## Example Usage

Show an example of how the feature would be used:

```bash
./run-kaseki.sh --new-flag
```

Or a code example:

```typescript
// How would this look?
```

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context

Any other information, mock-ups, or design documents?

## Is this a breaking change?

- [ ] Yes, this would break existing usage
- [ ] No, this is backward compatible

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks important workflows)
- [ ] High (nice to have, frequently requested)
- [ ] Medium (useful enhancement)
- [ ] Low (polish or niche use case)
